channel.description: M Janssen, U Schäkel, C Djuka Fokou, et al.

image.title: M Janssen, U Schäkel, C Djuka Fokou, et al.

item.title: A Randomized Open label Phase-II Clinical Trial with or without Infusion of Plasma from Subjects after Convalescence of SARS-CoV-2 Infection in High-Risk Patients with Confirmed Severe SARS-CoV-2 Disease (RECOVER): A structured summary of a study protocol for a randomised controlled trial.
